taxonomy: Scirpus grandispicus is classified as a species of sedge within the family Cyperaceae. It belongs to the genus Scirpus, which consists of various species of sedges. The family Cyperaceae is a large and diverse group of monocotyledonous plants that also includes other types of sedges and rushes. The classification of Scirpus grandispicus is further grouped into the order Poales and the class Liliopsida.
